name: deepseek-pilot
description: DeepSeek V4 Pro & Flash in GitHub Copilot Chat. Vision proxy for image attachments, KV-cache-aware context-window indicator, persistent reasoning cache, live session cost and platform balance in the status bar, a thinking-effort selector per model variant, and one-click wiring as Copilot's utility/utility-small model.

commands.title: DeepSeek Pilot: Set Vision Proxy Model
DeepSeek Pilot: Show Reasoning Cache Stats
DeepSeek Pilot: Show Context Window Details
DeepSeek Pilot: Use as Copilot Utility Model
DeepSeek Pilot: Use as Copilot Utility Small Model

deepseek-pilot.maxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens per request. 0 = API default (no limit).

enumDescriptions: Faster responses with shorter reasoning chains.
Maximum reasoning depth; slower and uses more tokens.
deepseek-pilot.reasoningEffort.markdownDescription: Reasoning effort for `(thinking)` model variants. Has no effect on non-thinking variants.

deepseek-pilot.modelIdOverrides.description: Optional API model ID overrides for DeepSeek-compatible proxy endpoints.

deepseek-v4-flash.description: API model ID to use for DeepSeek V4 Flash variants.

deepseek-v4-pro.description: API model ID to use for DeepSeek V4 Pro variants.

deepseek-pilot.visionModel.description: Model ID for vision proxy (describes images for text-only DeepSeek). Leave empty for auto-detection. Use 'DeepSeek Pilot: Set Vision Proxy Model' to pick from a list.

deepseek-pilot.visionPrompt.default: Describe the visual contents of this image in detail, including any text, objects, people, or context that would be relevant for understanding it. Focus on factual visual elements.
deepseek-pilot.visionPrompt.description: Prompt sent to the vision proxy model when describing image attachments.

deepseek-pilot.applyProDiscount.markdownDescription: Apply DeepSeek-V4-Pro's 75% promotional discount when estimating session cost. Auto-expires after the discount window ends (2026-05-31). Off by default so the displayed cost is an upper bound matching post-promo billing.

deepseek-pilot.contextWarnThreshold.markdownDescription: Percent of the model's context window at which the context-window status bar item turns yellow (warning). Below this, the indicator stays neutral and advises against compacting — DeepSeek's KV cache makes compaction expensive when there's still room.

deepseek-pilot.contextCriticalThreshold.markdownDescription: Percent of the model's context window at which the context-window status bar item turns red (critical) and recommends compacting immediately to avoid truncation. Must be greater than `deepseek-pilot.contextWarnThreshold`.

walkthroughs.title: DeepSeek Pilot — Setup
walkthroughs.description: Set up your DeepSeek API key and start using V4 models in Copilot Chat with vision + token tracking.

steps.title: Set your DeepSeek API key
steps.description:
[Get an API key](https://platform.deepseek.com/api_keys) from platform.deepseek.com.
[Set API Key](command:deepseek-pilot.setApiKey)

steps.title: Pick a DeepSeek V4 model
steps.description: Open Copilot Chat and select a DeepSeek V4 variant from the model picker. Four variants available: Pro/Flash × thinking/non-thinking. If they are hidden, use Manage Provider from the picker menu.

steps.title: Tune reasoning effort (optional)
steps.description: Switch between `high` and `max` for `(thinking)` variants. [Open Reasoning Effort Setting](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22deepseek-pilot.reasoningEffort%22)

steps.title: Support the project (optional)
steps.description: MIT and free. If it helps, [star the repo](https://github.com/konstantyn-ganenkov/deepseek-pilot) or [sponsor on GitHub](https://github.com/sponsors/konstantyn-ganenkov).

scripts.clean: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('out', { recursive: true, force: true, maxRetries: process.platform === 'win32' ? 10 : 0 })"
